calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-24-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
James Roach, Assistant Vice President for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Matthew Clarke, individualy and dba M. Clarke Engineering.
Doe defendants were dismissed without prejudice today, August 24, 2009.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on May 6, 2009.

Plaintiff introduced the following exhibits:

Exhibit 1--Commercial Master Lease Agreement, dated 8/23/05--------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2--Equipment Schedule Lease Terms, dated 8/23/05-----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3--Exhibit A to the Equipment Schedule---------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4--Order Granting Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings, filed 8/20/09--------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of the West, and against defendant Matthew Clarke, individually and dba M. Clarke Engineering as follows:

Principal - $17,655.00.
Interest - $1,219.68.
Attorney's Fees - 2,100.00.
Costs - $365.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $21,339.68.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in Exhibit 1 attached to the Judgment. Additionally, is hereby Ordered and Adjudged that defendant Matthew Clarke, individually and dba M. Clarke Engineering take nothing by way of his cross-complaint.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-24-2009 Assigned To Trial Court
